nmap.title: Nmap (Network Mapper)
nmap.description: Nmap is a powerful network discovery and security auditing tool used to identify live hosts, open ports, running services, operating systems, and potential vulnerabilities.

wireshark.title: Wireshark (Packet Analyzer)
wireshark.description: Wireshark captures and analyzes network packets in real time, allowing deep inspection of protocols and traffic behavior.

tcpdump.title: Tcpdump (Packet Capture Tool)
tcpdump.description: Tcpdump is a lightweight command-line packet capture tool widely used on servers and headless systems.

netcat.title: Netcat (Networking Swiss Army Knife)
netcat.description: Netcat is a versatile networking utility for reading and writing data over TCP and UDP connections.

bettercap.title: Bettercap (MITM Attack Framework)
bettercap.description: Bettercap is a powerful framework for performing man-in-the-middle attacks, network sniffing, and traffic manipulation.

burpsuite.title: Burp Suite (Web Security Tool)
burpsuite.description: Burp Suite is an integrated platform for testing web application security by intercepting and modifying HTTP/HTTPS traffic.

owaspzap.title: OWASP ZAP (Web Application Scanner)
owaspzap.description: OWASP ZAP is an open-source web application security scanner designed for beginners and professionals.

sqlmap.title: SQLmap (SQL Injection Tool)
sqlmap.description: SQLmap automates the detection and exploitation of SQL injection vulnerabilities in web applications.

hydra.title: Hydra (Online Brute Force Tool)
hydra.description: Hydra is a fast and flexible tool for performing online password brute-force attacks against network services.

hashcat.title: Hashcat (Advanced Hash Cracking Tool)
hashcat.description: Hashcat is a high-performance password recovery tool using CPU and GPU acceleration.

johntheripper.title: John the Ripper (Password Cracking Tool)
johntheripper.description: John the Ripper is a popular password auditing and recovery tool used to test password strength.

aircrackng.title: Aircrack-ng (Wireless Security Tool)
aircrackng.description: Aircrack-ng is a suite of tools for auditing wireless network security.

metasploit.title: Metasploit (Exploitation Framework)
metasploit.description: Metasploit is a powerful framework for developing, testing, and executing exploits.

maltego.title: Maltego (OSINT & Link Analysis Tool)
maltego.description: Maltego is an intelligence and forensics tool used for OSINT investigations and link analysis.

sherlock.title: Sherlock (Username OSINT Tool)
sherlock.description: Sherlock searches for usernames across multiple social media platforms.

shodan.title: Shodan (Internet Exposure Search Engine)
shodan.description: Shodan is a search engine for internet-connected devices and services.

theharvester.title: theHarvester (OSINT Recon Tool)
theharvester.description: theHarvester collects emails, subdomains, and public information related to a domain.
